Video.title: | Champions League classic

Video.title: | Arsenal reaches final

Video.summary: World Rowing is the official federation for rowing. Presenting World Rowing Cups, European Championships, the week-long World Rowing Championship, and the Beach Sprint, which will be part of the Olympics for the first time in LA 2028.
Video.title: WR Champs Shanghai - Finals D7
